conclusion: The authors report the synthesis and superconductivity of the body-centered cubic (bcc) $Im\text{-}3m$ phase of yttrium hexahydride ($YH_{6}$). This phase demonstrates a maximum measured $T_{c}$ of 224 K at 166 GPa. The superconducting transition temperature decreases with increasing pressure above this maximum, and a sharp drop in $T_{c}$ is observed below $\sim 165$ GPa.
